name: Hariharan C
role: Agentic AI Engineer & Python Backend Developer
headline: Building production-grade Agentic RAG systems, multi-agent LLM workflows, and scalable async Python backends for real-world telecom automation.
about: I'm an Agentic AI Engineer with 2+ years building production RAG systems, multi-agent LLM workflows, and scalable async Python backends for telecom automation. Specialized in LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, and hybrid cloud/on-prem LLM inference. Delivered 45% reduction in manual effort, 35% latency improvement, and ranked in top placements at three major AI hackathons across Google and Microsoft.
